column1: # ZAP baseline alert tuning for Next.js / Vercel deployment
# Actions: IGNORE=suppress entirely, WARN=treat as warning (default), FAIL=fail the build
# Content-Security-Policy — Next.js doesn't set a default CSP header; suppress for baseline

column3: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set

column1: # X-Frame-Options — Vercel sets this but ZAP sometimes misses it behind CDN
# Strict-Transport-Security — only served over HTTPS in production; Vercel handles it
# Server leaks version info via X-Powered-By — Next.js removes this but ZAP still flags

column3: Server Leaks Version Information via "X-Powered-By" HTTP Response Header

column1: # Cookie without SameSite — Supabase auth cookies; not a risk in this context
# Permissions Policy — not required for MVP
